openingQuery: A thoughtful gift for someone who loves morning rituals

chat.content: A thoughtful gift for someone who loves morning rituals

For a morning-ritual gift, the Stoneware Pour-Over Set ($95) is the strongest anchor: hand-thrown, useful every day, and still gift-like. Pair it with the Ceramic Tumblers ($78) if you want the gesture to feel complete; together they read as a quiet breakfast table, not just another kitchen object.

plan.flowSummary: Dispatcher → Curator + the-gift-table → find_pieces_hybrid (vector + Postgres FTS → RRF → cohere.rerank-v3-5:0)

toolCalls.description: Hybrid search for morning ritual gifts
toolCalls.sql:
WITH vector_results AS (
  SELECT product_id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector) AS vector_rank
  FROM product_catalog
  WHERE quantity > 0
  LIMIT 20
),
fts_results AS (
  SELECT product_id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY ts_rank_cd(description_tsv, $2::tsquery) DESC) AS text_rank
  FROM product_catalog
  WHERE quantity > 0
    AND description_tsv @@ $2::tsquery
  LIMIT 20
),
rrf AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(v.product_id, f.product_id) AS product_id,
         COALESCE(1.0 / (60 + v.vector_rank), 0) +
         COALESCE(1.0 / (60 + f.text_rank), 0) AS rrf_score
  FROM vector_results v
  FULL OUTER JOIN fts_results f USING (product_id)
)
SELECT product_id, rrf_score
FROM rrf
ORDER BY rrf_score DESC
LIMIT 30;
toolCalls.resultSummary: Reranked morning-ritual gifts with Stoneware Pour-Over Set first

subSteps.label: vector branch
subSteps.sql:
SELECT product_id, name, 1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS similarity
FROM product_catalog
WHERE quantity > 0
ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector
LIMIT 20;

subSteps.label: Postgres FTS branch
subSteps.sql:
SELECT product_id, name, ts_rank_cd(description_tsv, q) AS text_rank
FROM product_catalog, to_tsquery('english', 'morning:* | ritual:* | gift:*') q
WHERE quantity > 0 AND description_tsv @@ q
ORDER BY text_rank DESC
LIMIT 20;

subSteps.label: RRF merge
subSteps.sql:
SELECT product_id, rrf_score
FROM rrf
ORDER BY rrf_score DESC
LIMIT 30;

telemetry.title: cohere.rerank-v3-5:0
telemetry.description: Cohere Rerank v3.5 reads gift intent over the fused pool

sections.title: The ask
paragraphs: Anna's phrase mixed gift intent with a lifestyle clue. Hybrid retrieval kept useful morning objects in the pool while the-gift-table skill kept the answer from sounding utilitarian.
